{"aliases":["orders","order volume","order performance","sales orders"],"createdAt":"2026-04-14T17:13:51.251Z","dataSource":"ufg_mena_bi.anow_orders_master","description":"Order analytics metrics sourced from ufg_mena_bi.anow_orders_master","exampleQuestions":["order volume in UAE last week","top stores by orders in KSA","customer mix by prime status this month"],"filterMap":{"store_id":{"column":"store_name","mode":"prefix"},"prime_customer":"prime_customer","marketplace_id":"marketplace_id","country_code":{"column":"marketplace_id","transform":"marketplace"},"marketplace":{"column":"marketplace_id","transform":"marketplace"},"city":{"column":"city","mode":"contains_ci"},"category":"gl_product_group_desc","order_id":"order_id","leo_segment":"leo_segment"},"id":"RlnQI","metricId":"orders_analytics","updatedAt":"2026-04-15T13:13:09.387Z","variations":[{"requiredFilters":["order_day_start","order_day_end"],"exampleSql":"SELECT
  marketplace_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count,
  COUNT(*) AS item_count,
  SUM(CAST(quantity AS DOUBLE)) AS total_units,
  CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT order_id), 0) AS avg_items_per_order,
  SUM(CAST(quantity AS DOUBLE)) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT order_id), 0) AS avg_units_per_order
FROM "andes"."ufg_mena_bi.anow_orders_master"
WHERE CAST(order_day AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST('2026-04-01' AS DATE) AND CAST('2026-04-14' AS DATE)
  AND marketplace_id = 338801
GROUP BY marketplace_id
ORDER BY order_count DESC","variationId":"order_volume","isCsvEnabled":true,"description":"Aggregate order counts, item counts, and units per marketplace. Use when the user asks about overall order volume.","outputColumns":[],"label":"Order Volume","summaryHint":"Present a concise summary of order volumes across marketplaces. Highlight total orders, items, and units. Call out the marketplace with the highest volume.","sql":"SELECT
  marketplace_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count,
  COUNT(*) AS item_count,
  SUM(CAST(quantity AS DOUBLE)) AS total_units,
  CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT order_id), 0) AS avg_items_per_order,
  SUM(CAST(quantity AS DOUBLE)) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT order_id), 0) AS avg_units_per_order
FROM "andes"."ufg_mena_bi.anow_orders_master"
WHERE CAST(order_day AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST(':order_day_start' AS DATE) AND CAST(':order_day_end' AS DATE)
  AND marketplace_id = 338801
GROUP BY marketplace_id
ORDER BY order_count DESC"},{"requiredFilters":["order_day_start","order_day_end"],"exampleSql":"SELECT
  marketplace_id,
  store_name,
  city,
  COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count,
  COUNT(*) AS item_count,
  SUM(CAST(quantity AS DOUBLE)) AS total_units
FROM "andes"."ufg_mena_bi.anow_orders_master"
WHERE CAST(order_day AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST('2026-04-01' AS DATE) AND CAST('2026-04-14' AS DATE)
  AND marketplace_id = 338801
GROUP BY marketplace_id, store_name, city
ORDER BY order_count DESC, store_name ASC
LIMIT 50","variationId":"order_by_store","isCsvEnabled":true,"description":"Break down orders by store and city. Use when the user asks about specific stores.","outputColumns":[],"label":"Order By Store","summaryHint":"Summarize as a ranked list of stores by order count. Mention the top 3-5 stores and their cities.","sql":"SELECT
  marketplace_id,
  store_name,
  city,
  COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count,
  COUNT(*) AS item_count,
  SUM(CAST(quantity AS DOUBLE)) AS total_units
FROM "andes"."ufg_mena_bi.anow_orders_master"
WHERE CAST(order_day AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST(':order_day_start' AS DATE) AND CAST(':order_day_end' AS DATE)
  AND marketplace_id = 338801
GROUP BY marketplace_id, store_name, city
ORDER BY order_count DESC, store_name ASC
LIMIT 50"},{"requiredFilters":["order_day_start","order_day_end"],"exampleSql":"SELECT
  marketplace_id,
  city,
  COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT store_name) AS store_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS unique_customers
FROM "andes"."ufg_mena_bi.anow_orders_master"
WHERE CAST(order_day AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST('2026-04-01' AS DATE) AND CAST('2026-04-14' AS DATE)
  AND marketplace_id = 338801
GROUP BY marketplace_id, city
ORDER BY order_count DESC, city ASC
LIMIT 50","variationId":"order_by_city","isCsvEnabled":true,"description":"Aggregate orders by city with store and customer counts. Use for geographic distribution questions.","outputColumns":[],"label":"Order By City","summaryHint":"Summarize order distribution across cities. Highlight the top cities by order count.","sql":"SELECT
  marketplace_id,
  city,
  COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT store_name) AS store_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS unique_customers
FROM "andes"."ufg_mena_bi.anow_orders_master"
WHERE CAST(order_day AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST(':order_day_start' AS DATE) AND CAST(':order_day_end' AS DATE)
  AND marketplace_id = 338801
GROUP BY marketplace_id, city
ORDER BY order_count DESC, city ASC
LIMIT 50"},{"requiredFilters":["order_day_start","order_day_end"],"exampleSql":"SELECT
  marketplace_id,
  prime_customer,
  leo_segment,
  COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS unique_customers
FROM "andes"."ufg_mena_bi.anow_orders_master"
WHERE CAST(order_day AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST('2026-04-01' AS DATE) AND CAST('2026-04-14' AS DATE)
  AND marketplace_id = 338801
GROUP BY marketplace_id, prime_customer, leo_segment
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 50","variationId":"customer_mix","isCsvEnabled":true,"description":"Segment orders by prime status and LEO segment. Use for customer composition questions.","outputColumns":[],"label":"Customer Mix","summaryHint":"Break down customer composition by prime status and LEO segment. Highlight dominant segments.","sql":"SELECT
  marketplace_id,
  prime_customer,
  leo_segment,
  COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS unique_customers
FROM "andes"."ufg_mena_bi.anow_orders_master"
WHERE CAST(order_day AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST(':order_day_start' AS DATE) AND CAST(':order_day_end' AS DATE)
  AND marketplace_id = 338801
GROUP BY marketplace_id, prime_customer, leo_segment
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 50"},{"requiredFilters":["order_id"],"exampleSql":"SELECT
  marketplace_id,
  order_id,
  order_day,
  order_placed_datetime,
  order_datetime,
  checkout_promise_window_end,
  order_delivered_time,
  otp,
  mins_late,
  store_name,
  city,
  tile_name,
  prime_customer,
  leo_segment,
  customer_id,
  asin,
  item_name,
  gl_product_group_desc,
  quantity,
  our_price,
  list_price,
  ship_option
FROM "andes"."ufg_mena_bi.anow_orders_master"
WHERE order_id IN ('406-3033286-0385159')
ORDER BY order_datetime ASC
LIMIT 50","variationId":"order_trace","isCsvEnabled":true,"description":"Detailed order-level data including delivery times. Use when tracing a specific order. Requires order_id.","outputColumns":[],"label":"Order Trace","summaryHint":"Present order details in a timeline format. Focus on delivery performance and any late deliveries.","sql":"SELECT
  marketplace_id,
  order_id,
  order_day,
  order_placed_datetime,
  order_datetime,
  checkout_promise_window_end,
  order_delivered_time,
  otp,
  mins_late,
  store_name,
  city,
  tile_name,
  prime_customer,
  leo_segment,
  customer_id,
  asin,
  item_name,
  gl_product_group_desc,
  quantity,
  our_price,
  list_price,
  ship_option
FROM "andes"."ufg_mena_bi.anow_orders_master"
WHERE order_id = :order_id
ORDER BY order_datetime ASC
LIMIT 50"},{"requiredFilters":[],"exampleSql":"","variationId":"top_categories","isCsvEnabled":true,"description":"Rank product categories by order count and revenue. Use for product mix questions.","outputColumns":[],"label":"Top Categories","summaryHint":"Rank product categories by order volume and revenue. Highlight the top categories.","sql":"SELECT
  marketplace_id,
  gl_product_group_desc AS category,
  COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count,
  SUM(CAST(quantity AS DOUBLE)) AS total_units,
  SUM(CAST(our_price AS DOUBLE)) AS total_revenue
FROM "andes"."ufg_mena_bi.anow_orders_master"
WHERE CAST(order_day AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST(:start AS DATE) AND CAST(:end AS DATE){{dynamic_filters}}
  AND gl_product_group_desc IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY marketplace_id, gl_product_group_desc
ORDER BY total_units DESC, order_count DESC
LIMIT 50"},{"requiredFilters":[],"exampleSql":"","variationId":"avg_items_per_order","isCsvEnabled":true,"description":"Basket size metrics. Use when the user asks about basket size or order value.","outputColumns":[],"label":"Avg Items Per Order","summaryHint":"Summarize basket size metrics across marketplaces. Compare average items per order and order value.","sql":"SELECT
  marketplace_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count,
  COUNT(*) AS item_count,
  SUM(CAST(quantity AS DOUBLE)) AS total_units,
  CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT order_id), 0) AS avg_items_per_order,
  SUM(CAST(quantity AS DOUBLE)) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT order_id), 0) AS avg_units_per_order,
  SUM(CAST(our_price AS DOUBLE)) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT order_id), 0) AS avg_order_value
FROM "andes"."ufg_mena_bi.anow_orders_master"
WHERE CAST(order_day AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST(:start AS DATE) AND CAST(:end AS DATE){{dynamic_filters}}
GROUP BY marketplace_id
ORDER BY marketplace_id ASC"},{"requiredFilters":[],"exampleSql":"","variationId":"order_overview","isCsvEnabled":true,"description":"High-level order metrics including UPO, revenue, and promo spend. Use for executive summaries.","outputColumns":[],"label":"Order Overview","summaryHint":"Give a high-level overview of order metrics including volume, units per order, revenue, and promo spend.","sql":"SELECT
  marketplace_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count,
  COUNT(*) AS item_count,
  SUM(CAST(quantity AS DOUBLE)) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT order_id), 0) AS upo,
  SUM(CAST(COALESCE(ops_usd, 0) AS DOUBLE)) AS ops_usd,
  SUM(CAST(COALESCE(promo_amount_usd, 0) AS DOUBLE)) AS promo_usd
FROM "andes"."ufg_mena_bi.anow_orders_master"
WHERE CAST(order_day AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST(:start AS DATE) AND CAST(:end AS DATE){{dynamic_filters}}
GROUP BY marketplace_id
ORDER BY order_count DESC"}]}
